github.title: slimmsyd/short-form-vibe-edit

github.title: vllnt/skills
github.summary: 【GitHub】Open-source agent skills published by vllnt. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, Pi, Cursor, Windsurf, and any runtime that loads skills from Markdown directories. （⭐ 1）

models.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
models.summary: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.
models.title_zh: 被解雇的甲骨文员工试图通过谈判获得更好的遣散费。甲骨文拒绝了。
models.summary_zh: 有些人发现，由于公司将他们归类为远程工作者，他们不符合WARN法案的保护条件，例如提前两个月通知。
models.title_en: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
models.summary_en: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

models.title: Intel’s comeback story is even wilder than it seems
models.summary: Intel's stock has risen a stunning 490% over the past year, a bet by Wall Street that may be running well ahead of the company's actual turnaround.
models.title_zh: 英特尔的复出故事比看起来更疯狂
models.summary_zh: 英特尔股价在过去一年中上涨了惊人的490% ，这是华尔街的一个押注，可能远远领先于该公司的实际扭亏为盈。
models.title_en: Intel’s comeback story is even wilder than it seems
models.summary_en: Intel's stock has risen a stunning 490% over the past year, a bet by Wall Street that may be running well ahead of the company's actual turnaround.

models.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
models.summary: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.
models.title_zh: Cloudflare表示，人工智能使1100个工作岗位过时，尽管收入创下历史新高
models.summary_zh: Cloudflare宣布首次大规模裁员。首席执行官马修·普林斯（ Matthew Prince ）表示，由于人工智能效率的提高，该公司不需要那么多支持角色。
models.title_en: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
models.summary_en: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.

models.title: The “people’s airline” and the enterprise AI gold rush
models.summary: Everyone wants a piece of the enterprise AI pie, and this week, we saw a string of companies making their moves. From Anthropic and OpenAI announcing new joint ventures targeting enterprise AI deployment to SAP dropping $1B&#
models.title_zh: “人民航空公司”与企业AI淘金热
models.summary_zh: 每个人都想要一块企业AI馅饼，本周，我们看到了一系列公司正在采取行动。从Anthropic和OpenAI宣布针对企业人工智能部署的新合资企业到SAP下降$ 1B & #
